section.heading: Prohibition

content.p: The Director may not reduce the activities, projects, or volunteers funded under the other parts of this subchapter in order to support projects under this part.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 93–113, title II, § 232, as added Pub. L. 103–82, title III, § 351, Sept. 21, 1993, 107 Stat. 907.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Oct. 1, 1993, see section 392 of Pub. L. 103–82, set out as an Effective Date of 1993 Amendment note under section 4951 of this title.
